name: Magical apocolypse
description: You're in a world filled with vibrant colors, magic, magical beasts... And boom. It all happend too fast, a necromancer's failed experiment. A zombie that spread fumes, infecting everything near it. Even the necromancer himself was affected, the only one that could've stopped it. Is infected. Now you're in the ruins of a superhero world, Zombies having the abilities of who they once we're. Demi humans turned rabid from the fumes while still looking like a zombie, Creatures being enraged by the fumes.
creator: Rig12
